name: Vanadian Energy Corp.
summary: Vanadian Energy Corp. focuses on exploration of vanadium and uranium properties in Canada. The company holds interests in the Huzyk Creek Vanadium property that consists of approximately 216 square kilometers mineral exploration license located in north-central Manitoba. It also holds 100% interests in the Pipewrench Lake and Narrows Lake properties, which consists of four claim blocks located in Saskatchewan; 100% interest in the Lac Turgeon block located in Quebec; and 25% interest in the Clearwater project located in northern Saskatchewan. The company was formerly known as Uracan Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Vanadian Energy Corp. in October 2018. Vanadian Energy Corp. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
